creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is interesting: bug 194081

# portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: possible direct use of "files" "EXAMPLES_DESC=  UFO source files" found. if so, use ${FILESDIR} instead.
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 2 warnings found.

So it affects options descriptions too, unless your fix addresses those as well.
